changes.value: Frontend: Add rustCommand to CommandDef and dispatch function

changes.forward_patch:
--- original
+++ modified
@@ -1 +1 @@
-Extend CommandDef in command-scope.tsx with a `rustCommand` field and create a unified dispatch function.

```ts
interface CommandDef {
  // ...existing fields...
  contextMenu?: boolean;
  rustCommand?: { cmd: string; args: Record<string, unknown> };
}
```

Add dispatch logic: if `execute` is set, run it; if `rustCommand` is set, call `invoke("execute_command", { cmd, args })`.

Also add moniker utilities:
```ts
export function moniker(type: string, id: string): string { return `${type}:${id}`; }
export function parseMoniker(m: string): { type: string; id: string } { ... }
```

- [ ] Add `contextMenu?: boolean` to CommandDef
- [ ] Add `rustCommand?: { cmd: string; args: Record<string, unknown> }` to CommandDef
- [ ] Add `dispatchCommand(cmd: CommandDef)` that handles both execute and rustCommand
- [ ] Add moniker helper functions
- [ ] Update resolveCommand / useExecuteCommand to use dispatchCommand
- [ ] Update tests
- [ ] Run tests
\ No newline at end of file
+Extend CommandDef in command-scope.tsx with a `rustCommand` field and create a unified dispatch function.

```ts
interface CommandDef {
  // ...existing fields...
  contextMenu?: boolean;
  rustCommand?: { cmd: string; args: Record<string, unknown> };
}
```

Add dispatch logic: if `execute` is set, run it; if `rustCommand` is set, call `invoke("execute_command", { cmd, args })`.

Also add moniker utilities:
```ts
export function moniker(type: string, id: string): string { return `${type}:${id}`; }
export function parseMoniker(m: string): { type: string; id: string } { ... }
```

- [ ] Add `contextMenu?: boolean` to CommandDef
- [ ] Add `rustCommand?: { cmd: string; args: Record<string, unknown> }` to CommandDef
- [ ] Add `dispatchCommand(cmd: CommandDef)` that handles both execute and rustCommand
- [ ] Add moniker helper functions in lib/moniker.ts
- [ ] Update useExecuteCommand to use dispatchCommand
- [ ] Update existing tests

Tests (command-scope.test.tsx):
- [ ] `dispatchCommand calls execute when set` — mock execute fn, verify called
- [ ] `dispatchCommand calls invoke for rustCommand` — mock invoke, verify called with { cmd, args }
- [ ] `dispatchCommand prefers execute over rustCommand` — when both set, execute wins
- [ ] `dispatchCommand throws when neither execute nor rustCommand` — error for empty command
- [ ] `contextMenu flag defaults to undefined` — existing commands unaffected

Tests (moniker.test.ts):
- [ ] `moniker builds type:id string` — moniker("task", "abc") → "task:abc"
- [ ] `parseMoniker splits correctly` — parseMoniker("tag:xyz") → { type: "tag", id: "xyz" }
- [ ] `parseMoniker handles id with colons` — parseMoniker("task:foo:bar") → { type: "task", id: "foo:bar" }
- [ ] `parseMoniker throws on invalid` — no colon, empty parts
\ No newline at end of file
